name: easeup
description: 조용한 AI 웰니스 코치 — EaseUp (Electron + React + MediaPipe)

scripts.electron: node electron/scripts/make-tray-icons.cjs && concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.electron:build: node electron/scripts/make-tray-icons.cjs && npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
